en: Hello everyone, welcome to Bright Future School in Seri Kembanga.
Stop saying I am happy, it's too basic.
If you want to sound like a pro, say I am over the moon or I am thrilled.
At our school in Tayman Fadana, we focus on advanced English grammar every day from 8.30am to 1.30pm.
On Fridays, we are here from 8am to 12pm.
Don't forget, during Ramadan, our classes run from 8am to 12.30pm.
Join our class 6 and above to master your communication.
Subscribe to at Future Brick Chochulam and visit futurebrickchochulam.co for more tips from our male instructors.
